title: Music Criticism
description: Vocabulary for reviewing albums: production, arrangement, tonality, lyrical depth, sonic palette.
summary_pt_br: Crítica musical: produção, arranjo, tonalidade, profundidade lírica, paleta sonora, hook.

scenes.subtitle_en: Vocabulary for reviewing albums: production, arrangement, tonality, lyrical depth, sonic palette.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Crítica musical: produção, arranjo, tonalidade, profundidade lírica, paleta sonora, hook.

scenes.text_en: Vocabulary for reviewing albums: production, arrangement, tonality, lyrical depth, sonic palette. Focus: music criticism. The album's production feels deliberately lo-fi.
scenes.text_pt: Crítica musical: produção, arranjo, tonalidade, profundidade lírica, paleta sonora, hook. Foco: music criticism. A produção do álbum é propositalmente lo-fi.

scenes.title: Music Criticism
scenes.body_en: Key terms: PRODUCTION (overall sound), ARRANGEMENT (instruments/parts), TONALITY (mood/key), LYRICAL DEPTH (meaning), SONIC PALETTE (timbres), HOOK (memorable melody).
scenes.body_pt: Crítica musical: produção, arranjo, tonalidade, profundidade lírica, paleta sonora, hook.

examples.en: The album's production feels deliberately lo-fi.
examples.pt: A produção do álbum é propositalmente lo-fi.

examples.en: Arrangements shift from sparse to cacophonous.
examples.pt: Os arranjos mudam de escassos a caóticos.
A profundidade lírica recompensa múltiplas audições.

exercise.question: Complete: "The album's production feels ___ lo-fi."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The album's production feels deliberately lo-fi."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A produção do álbum é propositalmente lo-fi.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Arrangements shift from sparse to cacophonous.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Arrangements shift from sparse to cacophonous."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Os arranjos mudam de escassos a caóticos.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Music Criticism — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre music criticism. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Describe the album's production in one phrase.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: They shift from minimal to dense dramatically.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Melancholic major keys — hopeful but heavy.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Acoustic guitar, analog synths, brushed drums.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Track four — the hook refuses to leave you.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Music criticism is describing the indescribable.

scenes.title: The album review
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Review the album using at least three music terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the small magazine office, Rafa wrote a review of an album that had quietly become a phenomenon.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: The album's production feels deliberately lo-fi, intimate, and almost confessional from the very first track.

paragraphs.speaker: Editor
paragraphs.en: Arrangements shift from sparse acoustic moments to dense walls of sound with surprising emotional logic.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: The sonic palette — acoustic guitar, analog synths, and brushed drums — rewards multiple attentive listens.

paragraphs.speaker: Editor
paragraphs.en: Track four has a hook that refuses to leave the listener for days after the album has ended.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Music criticism, Rafa often said, is the humble act of describing what no vocabulary was ever truly built to capture.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Music Criticism". Vocabulary for reviewing albums: production, arrangement, tonality, lyrical depth, sonic palette. The album's production feels deliberately lo-fi. Arrangements shift from sparse to cacophonous. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Music Criticism". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
